qa_pair.question: Which file in the codebase exports the symbol SpelunkDB? Provide the repository-relative path.
Find the script in the commands directory that imports scanDirectory from ../core/scanner. What is the repository-relative path to this file?
How many total symbols (exports) are exported by the file src/core/query.ts? Return the numerical count.
Trace the outgoing dependencies of src/commands/scan.ts to find which file is at depth/rank 2 and exports FileRecord. What is the repository-relative path of this file?
Which file in the core directory exports the class SpelunkDB and has only external module/node imports? Provide the repository-relative path.
Identify the file in the src/core directory that has local imports from both ./db and ./parser. What is the repository-relative path of this file?
Use the structural diff tool to compare fileA as 'src/core/db.ts' and fileB as 'src/core/parser.ts'. What is the first exported symbol listed as added in fileB?
Trace the incoming imports (dependencies) of 'src/core/db.ts'. Which file at depth 1 imports 'src/core/db.ts' and also imports ./parser? Provide the repository-relative path.
Which file in the src/core directory exports the function resetParser? Provide the repository-relative path.
Find the script in the commands directory that imports runFind from ../core/query. What is the repository-relative path to this file?
